title: cyperus longus var. tenuiflorus
intro: Cyperus longus var. tenuiflorus, also known as slender-flowered flat sedge, is a variant of the Cyperus longus plant, a perennial sedge species native to Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Cyperus longus var. tenuiflorus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or powder, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
